expectations.text: The workflow distinguishes product-scope questions from questions answerable by exploration or official documentation.
expectations.evidence: Research summary has 13 links, 201 lines, official-source marker=True.

expectations.text: The workflow walks dependent decisions in order, resolving parent decisions before child decisions.
The PRD avoids specific file paths and code snippets while still citing existing product or architectural patterns.
expectations.evidence: Local/repo file paths in issue body=False; citation/source markers=34.

expectations.text: The Out of Scope section clearly excludes deferred onboarding paths, integrations, or implementation work.
expectations.evidence: Out of Scope section length=1013; exclusion markers=9.

expectations.text: The final output includes the GitHub issue title/body, intended gh issue create command, and any important assumptions or follow-up notes.
expectations.evidence: Issue title present=True; body heading order=True; gh command=True; assumptions/notes marker=True.

workarounds: Offline benchmark: real GitHub issue creation was intentionally replaced by saved issue title/body and intended gh issue create command.
